simple_types.name: Semantic
simple_types.code:
type Semantic is (Unknown,
                  BINORMAL,
                  COLOR,
                  CONTINUITY,
                  IMAGE,
                  INPUT,
                  IN_TANGENT,
                  INTERPOLATION,
                  …,
                  WEIGHT);

enumeration_literals.name: COLOR
enumeration_literals.description: Color coordinate vector. Color inputs are RGB (float3_type).

enumeration_literals.name: CONTINUITY
enumeration_literals.description: Continuity constraint at the control vertex (CV).

enumeration_literals.name: IN_TANGENT
enumeration_literals.description: Tangent vector for preceding control point.

enumeration_literals.name: LINEAR_STEPS
enumeration_literals.description: Number of piece-wise linear approximation steps to use for the spline segment that follows this CV.

enumeration_literals.name: OUT_TANGENT
enumeration_literals.description: Tangent vector for succeeding control point.

array_types.name: Inputs
array_types.code: type Inputs is array (Positive range <>) of Input_t;

array_types.name: Sources
array_types.code: type Sources is array (Positive range <>) of Source;

record_types.name: Input_t
Source

subprograms.name: find_in
subprograms.code: function find_in (Self : Inputs;   the_Semantic : in library.Semantic) return Input_t
